name: io.github.Raffaele86/seo-stack-mcp
description: The complete open-source SEO data stack for AI agents — Google Search Console, GA4, Bing Webmaster and Microsoft Clarity in one MCP server, with built-in analyst tools.

environment_variables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
environment_variables.description: Path to a Google service-account JSON key (enables GSC + GA4)

environment_variables.name: SEO_STACK_OAUTH_CLIENT
environment_variables.description: Path to a Google OAuth desktop client secrets JSON (alternative to service account)

environment_variables.name: BING_WEBMASTER_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Bing Webmaster Tools API key (enables Bing tools)

environment_variables.name: CLARITY_API_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Microsoft Clarity Data Export API token (enables Clarity tools)
